properties.displayName: Service Stop via scexe net Stop-Service or WMIC
properties.description: Detect attempts to stop Windows services using sc.exe stop, net stop, PowerShell Stop-Service, or WMIC service calls.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\sc.exe" and (CommandLine|contains|all has " stop ") and Image endswith "\net.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " net stop " or CommandLine|contains has " net  stop " or CommandLine|contains has " net  stop") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Stop-Service" or CommandLine|contains has "Set-Service -Status Stopped") and Image endswith "\wmic.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "service" or CommandLine|contains has "call stopservice" or CommandLine|contains has " where ")
